Here's the deal:
A recent poll has us DOWN THREE, our race is nearly guaranteed to decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, and the election is just 11 days away. And as of now, it looks like you haven't yet stepped up to double your impact on our top-tier Senate race, and the deadline is TONIGHT:
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc81/2a380d31/175327fe/ff9ef0/2088253842/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI4XzEwMjdQb2xsTWF0Y2gta2lja05PX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161028_1027PollMatch-kickNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
The clock is ticking -- there's not much time to turn this around.
**Governor Hassan is depending on you -- [please donate $3 or more before tonight's deadline and your gift could be DOUBLED in the fight to elect Maggie to the Senate, win back the majority, and ensure that our next Supreme Court justices work for families, NOT corporate special interests.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc81/2a380d31/175327fe/ff9ef0/2088253842/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI4XzEwMjdQb2xsTWF0Y2gta2lja05PX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161028_1027PollMatch-kickNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for stepping up,
Marc Goldberg
Campaign Manager, Maggie for NH
_\-----------Original Message-----------_
On Wednesday, October 26 at 9:57 AM, MaggieHassan.com
<info@maggiehassan.com> wrote:
I really hate to lose, team.
But our race here in New Hampshire will decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, and a poll released just yesterday shows that thanks to the $50 MILLION and counting in spending from Ayotte's special interest backers, if the election were held today, we would LOSE.
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc81/2a380d31/175327fe/ff9ef0/2088253842/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI4XzEwMjdQb2xsTWF0Y2gta2lja05PX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161028_1027PollMatch-kickNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
With just 13 days left, we're running out of time to pull ahead. That's why a group of generous donors has stepped up to DOUBLE online gifts, but only if we hit our $21,550 goal by Friday.
Our records indicate that you may be able to help us take the lead with a $3 donation. Please, I'm asking you directly: **[Give $3 or more now to potentially DOUBLE your impact in the fight to help elect Governor Hassan to the Senate, win back the majority, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc81/2a380d31/175327fe/ff9ef0/2088253842/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI4XzEwMjdQb2xsTWF0Y2gta2lja05PX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161028_1027PollMatch-kickNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3 (and it could become $6!)](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161028_1027PollMatch-kickNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25 (and it could become $50!)](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161028_1027PollMatch-kickNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50 (and it could become $100!)](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161028_1027PollMatch-kickNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc81/2a380d31/175327fe/ff9ef0/2088253842/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI4XzEwMjdQb2xsTWF0Y2gta2lja05PX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161028_1027PollMatch-kickNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
We're not kidding when we say that your gift now, during this match campaign, could be the difference between winning here in New Hampshire and handing Senate control to Washington Republicans.
With the Senate majority and our next Supreme Court justices on the line, there is too much at stake to wake up on November 9 wishing we had done just a little bit more.
**[Please, give $3 or more now-- every dollar you can -- to potentially DOUBLE your impact on this critically important race.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc81/2a380d31/175327fe/ff9ef0/2088253842/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI4XzEwMjdQb2xsTWF0Y2gta2lja05PX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161028_1027PollMatch-kickNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

Marc Goldberg

name: Diane Bedwell, jayinslee.com
subject: A note from the field
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
An update on our ground game. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTc4MDM1MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjI3Mzk2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Friend -- Our field operation is critical to Jay winning re-election. So I want to give you an update on how it's going, but I've gotta make it quick. Ballots have been in the hands of Washington voters for a week **and thousands of ballots have already been completed and returned.** Election Day is less than two weeks away. So our hardworking field team is mobilizing hundreds of volunteers to make thousands of phone calls and knock on thousands of doors in every part of the state -- and again and again we hear from voters about their love for Washington state, and the issues that impact their lives. While it makes for long days, all of us know how important it is that Democrats turn out and vote for Jay this year -- and the truth is, we really enjoy the work! [**That 's why, as Jay's field director, I'm making a special request. Can you help us power our GOTV organizing with a donation to our Ballot Completion Fund?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTc4MDM1MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjI3Mzk2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) **The team tells me we still need another $2,505 to make our Ballot Completion Fund goal.** I want you to know the difference every dollar makes as we organize in each community. Thanks to your support, we're expanding our phone banking, increasing our door-to-door contacts, and putting more volunteers to work. Because of you, we're running the best GOTV operation Washington has ever seen. **There 's still more to do, however. Even with less than two weeks left, we want to make sure every supporter for Jay has been reached. That's why I'm asking you to pitch in now, before it's too late.** [**Can you contribute to our GOTV effort immediately?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTc4MDM1MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjI3Mzk2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Okay, back to the war room! Thank you for standing with our field operation. All of us appreciate your support! Diane Bedwell
Field Director | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=OTc4MDM1MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjI3Mzk2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=9780353&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTAyMjI3Mzk2OAS2&l=5611360&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

name: Deborah Ross
subject: My shot (not throwing it away)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| When I decided to run for Senate, I didn't know if we'd be able to defeat Senator Burr and his millions of dollars of special interest cash.

Actually, lots of people would have told you I had no chance.

But I had to run. I had to try.

**This was my shot to give all North Carolinians a voice in the Senate and usher in a new era of progress in our state and the country.**

It turns out, North Carolinians were more than ready. Now, because of your grassroots support, we're almost there. This race is tied.

[_**We can 't throw it away. We can't let Super PACs and their late-surge spending save Senator Burr's seat. It's time for North Carolinians to be heard. Help us fight back by putting $5 toward our 24-hour goal.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427b3/2cc31c44/4b1b667/19f9b35c/459677390/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161028pm3?refcode=dre161028pm3_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Senator Burr has held us back for too long by doing nothing but serve special interests in the Senate. He spent 20+ years looking out for his own political career.

The strength of our campaign is proof that North Carolinians want change. [_**Let 's not waste this opportunity. Give $5.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427b3/2cc31c44/4b1b667/19f9b35c/459677390/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161028pm3?refcode=dre161028pm3_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thank you,

Deborah |
Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
P.O. Box 28258
Raleigh NC 27611 United States This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

body:
| | Friend -- We are so close to reaching our goal of getting 100 supporters to donate this week—**we’ve only 17 left to go** —and I am asking if you’ll help us get there by midnight tonight by **[contributing now.](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/bill_cole_donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1028_pm&n=1 "Donate Today")** From the beginning, this campaign has relied on donations from supporters like you, and **[I’m asking for you to help us get through the final stretch of the race by making an immediate contribution of $25, $50, or even $100 dollars today.](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/bill_cole_donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1028_pm&n=2 "Donate Today")** Let’s ensure a stronger, more prosperous West Virginia. body:

Friend, the JIG. IS. UP. The GOP's real motives on the Supreme Court have been revealed:
_"We will be united against any Supreme Court nominee that Hillary Clinton, if she were president, would put up. I promise you. " **\-- John McCain**_

_"There is long historical precedent for a Supreme Court with fewer justices... that 's a debate that we are going to have." **\-- Ted Cruz**_ That's right, Ted Cruz -- the same guy who brought you the Government Shutdown of 2014 -- has joined John McCain and made it clear **he 's ready to extend a constitutional crisis.**

**Taking back the Senate is the only way to stop Ted Cruz and his cronies. Can you pitch in $1 or more before Monday 's end-of-month deadline to make it happen? (Your gift will be TRIPLE-MATCHED!) **

The ONLY way to prevent that from happening is to make the most of our LAST match opportunity. A group of generous donors has agreed to match online donations through midnight TONIGHT, but only if we hit our $21,550 goal. Please, give $3 or more now to make DOUBLE the impact on this race:
****

**Right now, you have double the power to influence this race.[Just donate $3 or more -- anything you can -- before tonight's deadline so that we can double up our resources to elect Maggie to the Senate, take back the majority, and ensure that our next Supreme Court justices work for the people, not corporate special interests.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc98/2a380d31/17530e56/ff9edc/3239170368/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI4XzEwMjZnZW5lcmFsLW1hdGNoTk9fbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161028_1026general-matchNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Deborah Ross
subject: a senator for the rich
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Senator Burr has served wealthy individuals and powerful corporations throughout his 20+ years in Washington.

And now that we're on the brink of defeating him, that's exactly who is running to his rescue. **A Super PAC tied to Mitch McConnell dropped $3 million in North Carolina for the last two weeks of the race.**

[_**This is exactly how Senator Burr returns to Washington year after year. We need to stop this cycle. Chip in $5, so we reach our $50,000 goal. We only have hours left before our deadline.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427b4/2cc31c44/4b43a04/19f9b3a0/1714955868/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161028pm4?refcode=dre161028pm4_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

I'm running for Senate because the people of North Carolina need a Senator who fights for them and their economic security. Rich and powerful special interest groups will do just fine on their own.

The latest poll from Siena College has us up by one point. But this last-minute spending spree could really hurt us if we don't raise enough grassroots resources. Air time in the final two weeks is expensive.

[_**We 've come too far to be drowned out by Senator Burr's special interest friends. We can't afford to miss this goal. Give $5 or $10 before it's too late.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427b4/2cc31c44/4b43a04/19f9b3a0/1714955868/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161028pm4?refcode=dre161028pm4_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thank you,

Deborah |
Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
P.O. Box 28258
Raleigh NC 27611 United States This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Donald J. Trump, Jr.
subject: DEADLINE: Time is running out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Help my father finish strong and WIN on Tuesday, November 8th. |
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38425218:scmoqYuN9:m:1:876315805:8A224DDCB6A496526F6F50E2123A3E2B:r)
Peter,

There are now just ten days left until Election Day. We're fighting 24/7 to win and pulling out all the stops to make it happen...

__**... and we're counting on EVERY supporter to get involved for this final stretch!**__

It's now or never. You and I both know the consequences of losing this election would be disastrous for our country.

**Everything is on the line, from our battered economy and health care system to our national security and constitutional rights!**

My father is putting in $10 million to win, and we're working to raise another $10 million by the end of the month to fund our final ad blitz and support our Trump ground teams.

We need you on board more than ever before. Our deadline is less than 72 hours away.

[**Join Team Trump TODAY to help us hit our $10 Million Trump Victory Goal and put my father over the top to WIN!**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38425218:scmoqYuN9:m:1:876315805:8A224DDCB6A496526F6F50E2123A3E2B:r)

**[CONTRIBUTE $250 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38425219:scmoqYuN9:m:1:876315805:8A224DDCB6A496526F6F50E2123A3E2B:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $100 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38425220:scmoqYuN9:m:1:876315805:8A224DDCB6A496526F6F50E2123A3E2B:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $50 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38425221:scmoqYuN9:m:1:876315805:8A224DDCB6A496526F6F50E2123A3E2B:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $25 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38425222:scmoqYuN9:m:1:876315805:8A224DDCB6A496526F6F50E2123A3E2B:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38425218:scmoqYuN9:m:1:876315805:8A224DDCB6A496526F6F50E2123A3E2B:r)**
If you're supporting my father in this race, but just haven't been able to offer financial support up to this point, I understand. So many Americans are in the same boat.

The Obama economy and his terrible policies have squeezed EVERYONE - young people, families with children, our senior citizens and struggling small businesses - _**and a Hillary Clinton victory would mean four more years of the same!**_

But by getting involved today, you can help end the rigged system and turn things around for our country.

[**ACT NOW to help us win - with your help we'll make my father, Donald J. Trump, the 45th President of the United States!**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38425218:scmoqYuN9:m:1:876315805:8A224DDCB6A496526F6F50E2123A3E2B:r)

January 20, 2017 can be a new day for America, when my father takes the oath of office because you helped him win on Election Day. We can't afford to lose.

Your support will help us hit our $10 Million Trump Victory Goal to make a HUGE impact in these final days off the campaign!

[**I hope you choose to get involved.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38425218:scmoqYuN9:m:1:876315805:8A224DDCB6A496526F6F50E2123A3E2B:r) My father greatly appreciates every supporter who is standing with him in this historic race for the White House.

Thank you!

For America,

Donald J. Trump, Jr.

P.S. With ten days to go we're pulling out all the stops, because we know this race will come down to the wire. **[Help my father win big by joining our efforts today- our end-of-month deadline is less than 72 hours away!](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38425218:scmoqYuN9:m:1:876315805:8A224DDCB6A496526F6F50E2123A3E2B:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38425218:scmoqYuN9:m:1:876315805:8A224DDCB6A496526F6F50E2123A3E2B:r)** | Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
---

name: Paul Ryan
subject: FWD: Paul Ryan GONE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body: Peter -- It's no secret the Democrats want me gone. Just take a look at the subject line of the email they sent out earlier this week. I'm used to it. It's part of the job. But this email caught my eye. President Obama is personally mobilizing his supporters to defeat me. President Obama wants me "GONE". First, we learned about Hillary Clinton shifting resources to elect Nancy Pelosi as Speaker. Now, President Obama is fully onboard. Peter -- I'm counting on you to help me fight back. Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>> http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38424464:W9KjLbuNG:m:3:1155937413:381D9601BCFAEAF4E09A375B52817805:r Pitch in $50 IMMEDIATELY >>> http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38424465:W9KjLbuNG:m:3:1155937413:381D9601BCFAEAF4E09A375B52817805:r Pitch in $75 IMMEDIATELY >>> http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38424466:W9KjLbuNG:m:3:1155937413:381D9601BCFAEAF4E09A375B52817805:r With only 10 days remaining before the election, we cannot afford to waste a moment. Best, Speaker Paul Ryan PITCH IN NOW http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38424467:W9KjLbuNG:m:3:1155937413:381D9601BCFAEAF4E09A375B52817805:r -- Begin Forwarded Message -- From: OBAMA VIDEO (via DCCC) Date: October 24, 2016 Subject: Paul Ryan GONE This is incredible: President Obama recorded a personal video for you -- and he's fired up! Take a look at what he said: I've been out campaigning for my friend Hillary Clinton a lot lately. But this election isn't just about defeating Donald Trump. It's also about electing strong Democrats to Congress and winning back our House Majority from the Republicans. And the way I see it, we have two choices in November. We can elect a strong Democratic Majority that knows our best days are still ahead of us. Or we can settle for two more years of an obstructionist Republican Congress. A Congress that would rather give tax breaks to billionaires than raise the minimum wage. A Congress that wants to repeal affordable health care and is determined to roll back our progress. That difference is why I'm doing everything I can to make sure our Democrats all around the country have what they need to win. And that's why I need you. Because these final days? They're make-or-break. We're up against powerful special interests and unprecedented millions of dollars, all working to undo everything we've achieved these past 8 years. It's going to be challenging -- but we have a real shot here. So I need all of you to step up and help! And if you do, I think the American people will make the right choice. What do you say -- can I count on you? DEADLINE TOMORROW: ALL GIFTS TRIPLE-MATCHED Triple match my $2 >> Triple match my $3 >> Triple match my $4 >> Triple match my $5 >> Triple match my $6 >> Or triple match another amount >> Watch the video here and stand with President Obama to defeat the Republican Majority in Congress >> Thank you, DCCC Prefer to donate by mail? Visit here. http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38424468:W9KjLbuNG:m:3:1155937413:381D9601BCFAEAF4E09A375B52817805:r Contributions to Team Ryan are not tax deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Scott Walker's online community. Click below if you would prefer to not receive future emails from Team Ryan: https://email.granitelists.com/form/103832/5741/preferences?enc=W9KjLbuNG&eemail=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mhash=1dd1aad6a263507b2f311c88c84453f9 Click here to unsubscribe.

subject: It's all coming together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Time is running out to get the funding we need and still be spent in time to make a difference on November 8th . |

Friend, Donald Trump is determined to make this country great again as the 45th President of the United States -- and he’s just as determined to earn your urgently-needed support today. With just 10 days left in this race, we face a rapidly-narrowing window of time to secure the campaign funding that ensures our absolutely crucial final week messaging and Get-Out-the-Vote ground game are sufficiently-funded and historic in effect. Friend, we’ve got to raise $20 million to do it by the October End of Month fundraising deadline -- and my father is putting in $10 million to get us half-way there. Will you take this opportunity right now to help us match that start with your crucial $10 Million October End of Month Fundraising Drive contribution of $25 or more today? Time is running out to get the funding we need and still be spent in time to make a difference on November 8th. So please don’t hesitate, Friend -- there’s never been a better time to make an impact for this movement -- lend your support to Donald Trump for President today. Sincerely, Eric Trump P.S. -- Friend, our momentum is peaking at just the right time -- so please help us reach the greatest number of Trump supporters and generate an unbelievably huge turnout that makes Donald Trump our President. Will you help make that victory reality with your immediate $10 Million End of Month gift of $25, $50, $75, or even $100 or more today? Thanks, Eric CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

name: Ben Carson
subject: It's not too late
body:
Sign your pledge to vote today and invite others to do the same.
| [View this email in your browser.
](http://email.bencarson.com/p/vWUyLfbu5N)
---|---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38431155:WUyLfbu5N:m:1:876315805:ACC9596864C2BA6513C9835D4621522C:r)
---
* * *
Dear Peter,

Election Day is right around the corner. Rest assured, it's not too late to make your faith matter!
**
You can use your God-given freedom and voice to shape the future of America.
**
Over 6,400 critical state races will be decided on November 8th:

* 12 governors

* 24 US senators

* 435 members of the US House of Representatives
* 1,210 senators in 42 statehouses
* 4,710 representatives in 44 statehouses

And this list doesn't even include county and city level elections in your community!

[ Your faith matters now more than ever. So pledge to vote and invite others to do the same! ](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38431156:WUyLfbu5N:m:1:876315805:ACC9596864C2BA6513C9835D4621522C:r)
Sincerely,

Ben Carson
My Faith Votes

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38431156:WUyLfbu5N:m:1:876315805:ACC9596864C2BA6513C9835D4621522C:r) ****

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://email.bencarson.com/p/iWUyLfbu5N). [Update your preferences](http://email.bencarson.com/p/oWUyLfbu5N)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?donaldjtrump=2Ecom?=
subject: Help us close strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
It’s now or never – JOIN to help us hit $10 Million Trump Victory Goal. |

Friend, This is big news – Mr. Trump is putting in $10 million of his own money into the campaign, because he is that determined to win and get work for you in Washington. That gets us halfway to what we need to ramp up our final ad blitz and get-out-the-vote efforts and WIN. And that’s where your support comes in. I know you want to see Mr. Trump prevail over the Clinton campaign machine and the lying liberal media. We need you on board for our final end-of-month fundraising push, Friend. JOIN Team Trump to help us hit our $20 Million Trump Victory Goal by midnight on Monday... with your help we’ll close strong and WIN on November 8th. We’re just 11 days from Election Day, and hitting this goal is crucial to our success. The race is tight and we’re fighting to gain the edge in key battlegrounds across the country. We’re counting on supporters like you to get involved IMMEDIATELY. JOIN WITH TRUMP VICTORY GOAL CONTRIBUTION We need Mr. Trump’s bold leadership in the White House, to end the rigged system and Make America Great Again. This is our chance to change our nation’s course and avoid utter disaster – you know that’s what a Hillary Clinton presidency would mean for our country. Our records indicate you’ve shown your support for Mr. Trump, but have not yet contributed financially to the campaign’s success. It’s now or never. Make a $100, $75, $50, $35, $20 or even $10 or $5 Trump Victory Goal contribution, and I’ll add you to the list of new supporters we send to Mr. Trump each morning. Let’s get to work. Let’s make Mr. Trump the next President of the United States on November 8th, so he can get to work for all of us in Washington. Thank you, For America, Brad Parscale, Digital Director P.S. Mr. Trump is putting in $10 million of his own money so we can win big on Election Day. And we’re asking supporters like you to JOIN Team Trump at this critical time, so we can raise $10 million more by the end of the month to close strong and WIN. Make your most generous possible Trump Victory Goal contribution. JOIN WITH TRUMP VICTORY GOAL CONTRIBUTION

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Well, I’ve got news for them
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3470331230115856384/-1995631196599484416?refcode=e20161029.2&refcode2=e20161029.2nd&amount=25)
---
Friends, I'll keep this quick.

There are just 10 days until Election Day. We've fought long and hard together to get here -- but this race is still in a **_dead heat_**.

Toomey has Wall Street and Super PACs on his side. Days ago, they announced they're ploughing another $5.2 MILLION into defeating us and our fight for working families.

**Well, I 've got news for them: We will NOT stand aside and let them buy this race. We will NOT give them another six years to put special interests before Pennsylvania.**

[**Team, I need your help now to drive this race to the finish line. Every donation for the next two days is TRIPLED to make 3x the impact >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3470331230115856384/-1995631196599484416?refcode=e20161029.2&refcode2=e20161029.2nd&amount=25)

[**www.katiemcginty.com/oct-deadline**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3470331230115856384/-1995631196599484416?refcode=e20161029.2&refcode2=e20161029.2nd&amount=25)

Determined to win--

Katie

| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 10 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3470331230115856384/-1995631196599484416?refcode=e20161029.2&refcode2=e20161029.2nd&amount=25)**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: Aisling Kerins, jayinslee.com
subject: All out - before it’s too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We're reaching voters everywhere this weekend. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc4MDQ4MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjI3Njg1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Friend, **Democrats are carrying out the largest Get Out the Vote operation ever seen in Washington this weekend. Can you help?** Dozens of staff members are working with hundreds of volunteers to reach many thousands of voters over the next few days. We will be knocking on doors and making phone calls across the state. **And we 're doing it for one simple reason: To reach every Democrat and make sure they vote for Jay and for progressives up and down the ballot.** Our volunteers are absolutely terrific. But this sort of field organizing takes real resources: Clipboards, pens, phone lines, snacks -- and that's why I'm asking you to help. [**Will you help our 72-hour GOTV push with a donation? Every dollar coming through the door will be immediately used to support our field efforts.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc4MDQ4MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjI3Njg1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) We want to ensure a SURGE of returned Democratic ballots for Jay in every county next week. To do it, we need your help. Thank you for supporting our weekend GOTV push, Aisling Kerins
Campaign Director | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=OTc4MDQ4MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjI3Njg1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: Friend, do you know how you’re voting?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We’ve got momentum on our side — and with Election Day right around the corner, it couldn’t come at a better time! | | | | | | | |
---|---|---
| | | | Friend, We’ve got momentum on our side — and with Election Day right around the corner, it couldn’t come at a better time! **The future of Indiana will come down to our victory on Election Day.** Either we can continue Indiana’s forward momentum and take our state to the next level or we fall back to the tried-and-failed liberal policies of the past. **We need every Team Holcomb supporter to cast their ballot and make their voice heard this election. Do you know how you’ll vote this year?**
---
| | [ **** Vote Absentee ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/816ace13418e42a09c89eec8ed67816e?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=74193d1e9a8f433591de959e10b603a2&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_1&utm_term=vote_vbm&utm_campaign=gotv&utm_content=20161028-friend-do-you-know-how-youre-voting-20887-vote&utm_pagename=absentee%20ballot)

name: Joe Biden
subject: must-win:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e72/738133e4/320cc837/7f85959e/3224964930/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme1610jb?refcode=pme1610jb_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---
| Hi friend--I wanted to reach out to talk to you about something very close to my heart: the future of the United States Senate, an institution I served in most of my life.

I understand the role it plays in determining our country's progress--or stalling it. That's why I'm fighting so hard for my friend Patrick Murphy. [**Can you chip in $10 right now to help him win?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e72/738133e4/320cc837/7f85959e/3224964930/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme1610jb?refcode=pme1610jb_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

**After years of Republican obstructionism and gridlock, it's clearly time to make some changes.**

And one of our best chances to take back the Senate is in Florida with my friend, Patrick Murphy. I've campaigned with Patrick across Florida. He's the real deal. He's a leader you can believe in as I do. And one thing I know for sure--unlike his opponent, Patrick Murphy will show up to work and do everything he can for his state and for our country.

**Florida is a must-win race if we want to turn the Senate blue and build on the progress we've made under President Obama --and that we can make if we elect Hillary to the White House.** But we can't do that unless we help out Patrick Murphy now. [**This is our last big push -- can you step up and help him out before October's end of month deadline?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e72/738133e4/320cc837/7f85959e/3224964930/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme1610jb?refcode=pme1610jb_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Patrick needs your help, team. Republicans know that if they lose Florida, they can't retain their control of the Senate. That's why they are spending and saying everything they can to hold their grip on power. This race is coming down to the wire. [**Will you step up for him? We need you >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e72/738133e4/320cc837/7f85959e/3224964930/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme1610jb?refcode=pme1610jb_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Thanks,
Joe Biden

|
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e72/738133e4/320cc837/7f85959f/3224964930/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e72/738133e4/320cc837/7f859598/3224964930/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump=2C=20Jr=2E?=
subject: DEADLINE: Time is running out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Help my father finish strong and WIN on Tuesday, November 8th. Join Team Trump today. |

Friend. As I sit down to write this note there are just ten days until Election Day. Getting you involved in my father’s campaign has NEVER been more important. Team Trump is working 24/7 to win, so my father can get to work for you in the White House. He's determined to overcome the Clinton campaign machine, and he’s putting in $10 million of his own money. Now we’re working to raise another $10 million from supporters like you to fund our final ad blitz and support our Trump ground teams in key battlegrounds. We need you on board more than ever before, and our end-of-month deadline is coming up fast at MIDNIGHT on Monday. Join today with a $100, $75, $50, $35, $20 or $10 contribution to help us hit this goal and put my father over the top to WIN. JOIN WITH TRUMP VICTORY GOAL CONTRIBUTION If you’re supporting my father in this race, but just haven’t been able to offer financial support up to this point, I understand. So many Americans are in the same boat. The Obama economy and his terrible policies have squeezed EVERYONE – young people, families with children, our senior citizens and struggling small businesses – and a Hillary Clinton victory would mean four more years of the same. But by getting you involved today, at any level, you can help end the rigged system and turn things around for our country. ACT NOW to help us win on November 8th – with your help we’ll make my father, Donald J. Trump, the 45th President of the United States. January 20, 2017 can be a new day for America, when my father takes the oath of office because you helped him win on Election Day. Please help us hit our $20 Million Trump Victory Goal by midnight on Monday. It’s all hands on deck right now and every day counts. Thank you. For America, Donald J. Trump, Jr. JOIN WITH TRUMP VICTORY GOAL CONTRIBUTION

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Team Ross
subject: BREAKING: NEW YORK TIMES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| The _New York Times_ just endorsed Deborah for Senate.

**This is a big deal.**

It reaffirms that this isn't just about North Carolina. The outcome of our race will affect the entire country.

[_**We need Deborah to win this race and help Democrats reclaim the Senate majority. Please give $5 or $10 to help us beat Senator Burr.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427b7/2cc31c44/4b8bca0/19f9b244/577169792/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161029?refcode=dre161029_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Senator Burr and his fellow Senate Republicans have used their majority to the detriment of the American people. **They 've played politics, blocked important legislation, and failed to uphold their constitutional duties.**

**Deborah 's victory could help put an end to this.** It would give Democrats the number of seats they need to move forward on important priorities like filling the vacancy on the Supreme Court, raising the minimum wage, and protecting Social Security and Medicare.

Republicans know their reign of obstruction is close to ending. Their main Super PAC just snapped up $3 million in T.V. airtime to try and derail Deborah's momentum.

[_**We need serious closing strength to fend them off. Contribute $5 or $10 to help us defeat Senator Burr and claim control of the Senate for Democrats.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427b7/2cc31c44/4b8bca0/19f9b244/577169792/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161029?refcode=dre161029_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team Ross |

subject: Fwd: Gov. Scott Walker is coming to Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
You don't want to miss this exciting event! Governor Scott Walker is coming to Missouri TOMORROW to support Eric Greitens on his mission to bring more jobs, higher pay, safer streets, and better schools to our state.

Get all the details on our rallies with Scott Walker below:

Sunday, October 30th
1:15 PM - Springfield Rally with Eric Greitens and Scott Walker
DETAILS: [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/eric-greitens-and-scott-walker-rally-in-springfield-tickets-28841021271](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=21514f3f02&e=84041254e6)

4:00 PM - St. Louis Rally with Eric Greitens and Scott Walker
DETAILS: [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/eric-greitens-and-scott-walker-rally-in-st-louis-tickets-28840433513](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=bc369cbe77&e=84041254e6)

7:00 PM - Kansas City Rally with Eric Greitens and Scott Walker
DETAILS: [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/eric-greitens-and-scott-walker-rally-in-kansas-city-tickets-28844226859](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=97783722b2&e=84041254e6)

Hope to see you there!

On to Victory,
AC

Austin Chambers
Campaign Manager

\----------Forwarded message----------
From: Team Greitens
Date: Fri, Oct 29, 2016
Subject: Gov. Scott Walker is coming to Missouri

Governor Scott Walker will be in Missouri on Sunday to support Eric Greitens on his mission to take Missouri in a new direction. Governor Walker is a great conservative leader and we're excited to welcome him to the Show Me State. We're hosting three rallies in Springfield, St. Louis, and Kansas City.

[Get the details](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=7780d093a7&e=84041254e6) our rallies with Governor Scott Walker.
[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=5815776589&e=84041254e6)
We hope you can [join us](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=6896129221&e=84041254e6) and [spread the word](mailto:?subject=Gov.%20Scott%20Walker%20is%20Coming%20to%20Missouri&body=Governor%20Scott%20Walker%20is%20coming%20to%20Missouri%20for%20a%20rally%20supporting%20Eric%20Greitens%20for%20governor!%20Get%20the%20details%20here%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fericgreitens.com%2Fscott-walker-is-coming-to-missouri%2F) about our rallies with Scott Walker on Sunday!

On to Victory,
Team Greitens
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=76f53cf9ca), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@ericgreitens.com](mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: our final challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
There are just 10 days left in this campaign, and it's our duty to ensure that Maryland voters across our state make it to the polls during Early Voting or on Election Day to help move our state and c |
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b63/70cdc2ba/4736aeb4/3978d1f/2452538164/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092816_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em102916&source=em102916") Friend,

No election in our lifetime has been as disruptive and unpredictable as this 2016 election. We need a strong vote to ensure we keep this Maryland Senate seat Blue, win a Democratic Senate majority and elect Hillary Clinton to be our next President.

We also need to trounce Trumpism so that it cannot rise from the ashes to undermine the ability of our government to function for the next four years.

There are just 10 days left in this campaign, and it's our duty to ensure that Maryland voters across our state make it to the polls during Early Voting or on Election Day to help move our state and country forward.

Fifteen percent of voters are still undecided in this Senate race. **[Friend, will you help us get over the finish line strong?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b63/70cdc2ba/4736aeb4/3978d1c/2452538164/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em102916&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+FIRSTNAMEFriend+will+you+help+us+get+ove&utm_campaign=em102916&source=em102916")**

Many thanks,

Chris [ Chip in Now](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b63/70cdc2ba/4736aeb4/3978d1d/2452538164/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode= em102916&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+FIRSTNAME+Chip+in+Now&utm_campaign=em102916&source=em102916")

subject: I did this for our supporter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
What I’m doing for our supporters |

Friend, I want to show you this message from one of our strongest donors:
I have never donated to any presidential campaign. I only work part time so that I can be home for my daughter and be off when she needs me so I can only donate a small amount but I believe enough in Mr. Trump's policies that I have sacrificed a few things just to be able to donate the little that I could. -Vonnie T., a hard-working patriot from Florida Vonnie might think she only gave “a little.” But her $6 contribution was a BIG sacrifice for our country. Thanks to Vonnie and millions of patriots just like her, we’ve collectively raised hundreds of millions of dollars and set an all-time record for Republican fundraising. And her tremendous sacrifice is what inspired me to do something HUGE! I’m putting in an UNPRECEDENTED TEN MILLION DOLLARS TO OUR CAMPAIGN. But I need YOU to join me before our end-of-month deadline. Please make a contribution toward our FINAL goal. CONTRIBUTE $6 CONTRIBUTE $25 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE $200 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Hillary might have the special interests and millionaire lobbyists on her side, but we have something far more powerful: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. We have millions of hard-working patriotic Americans chipping in whatever they can to save our country. I’m truly proud of that. And today I want to say thanks to all of our supporters by putting in an unprecedented TEN MILLION DOLLARS to this campaign. Your contribution today will help fund our FINAL ad blitz and get-out-the-vote ground game in battleground states that will determine the outcome of this historic election. Please make a contribution toward our FINAL end-of-month goal. Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Al Franken
subject: Weekend: CANCELED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505d6/7be36b49/1e0df4f5/78f9a7eb/3244388884/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Hi all. I'm Senator Al Franken. And I'm here to tell you the weekend has been canceled.

That's right. Evan Bayh needs us way too much to take a break. _USA Today_ called the race a "tossup." A new Monmouth poll showed Evan with _just a three-point lead._

Take it from the guy who won his first Senate race by 312 votes -- **in a race this tight, every minute counts.**

Sorry, did you have plans for the weekend? Friends? Family to see? OK, I'll make a deal with you. **[Click here, donate $5 or more toward Evan's $60,000 goal right now, and I'll let you off the hook.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505d6/7be36b49/1e0df4f5/78f9a7ea/3244388884/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161029nd&amount=10")** Because in a race this tight -- every dollar matters, too.

Why does every dollar matter? Because the special interests are spending big bucks in Indiana. **Super PACs have spent _nine times more_ to defeat Evan than his opponent has.**

Whatever we raise for Evan now will help keep ads on the air, pay for phone lines, food for volunteers, or enough coffee to keep the campaign team awake for the last 10 days of the campaign.

All of those things are important to beat the special interests. All of it costs money. And some of that money comes from you.

**So here 's your chance if you can't give up your weekend. [Make a huge impact on Evan's campaign by giving $5 or more.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505d6/7be36b49/1e0df4f5/78f9a7ea/3244388884/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161029nd&amount=10")**

Thanks!

Al

P.S.: You may not know this about me -- but I put an "extra ask" in the P.S. of all my emails. Yes, it works. Yes, I'm going to put it here too. **[Last chance to help Evan out (in this email, anyway) -- give $5 or more.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505d6/7be36b49/1e0df4f5/78f9a7ea/3244388884/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161029nd&amount=10")** **** ******** **** ********[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505d6/7be36b49/1e0df4f5/78f9a7ea/3244388884/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161029nd&amount=10")********
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | Hi there,

We're just over a week from Election Day, and women are already heading to the polls to do their part to stop Donald Trump.

But here's the thing: Trump's fall has opened up a big opportunity for us to also win seats held by some of the worst Republicans in the House.

Trump is out there saying horrific things about sexual assault and women's health care, while Republicans in Congress have been voting to defund Planned Parenthood and arguing against renewing the Violence Against Women Act. The more our candidates are able to show those parallels, the better they're doing in the polls.

But to get the word out -- especially with so few days left in the election -- our candidates need our support to tip the scales in some of these newly competitive races.

**Donate $5 or more before October's over, and we'll send you a Women Can Stop Trump sticker as a thank you:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/October-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c747e/24c69fd9/a9efbc3/18ed9128/3498426408/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161028_email_OctoberGoal-sticker?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgOctoberGoal&utm_campaign=WPEFEV79N_digital_email_20161029_TrumpHouse_n-all&source=WPEFEV79N_digital_email_20161029_TrumpHouse_n-all")**

name: Barney Frank
subject: I'm asking, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The outcome of 2016 depends on Democrats' resources, the strength of the grassroots, and whether dark money will buy our democracy... [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161029-Frank-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend -- In a post-_Citizens United_ era, only grassroots Democrats can overpower GOP dark money. [**That 's why I'm asking you to pitch in before the DSCC's last end-of-month deadline.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161029-Frank-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Because unless we step up now, right-wing Super PACs and special interests will place the highest bid to win the Senate majority.

**The _only_ way we stop them from buying our democracy is giving what we can to help Democrats, one dollar at a time.**

**Will you help the DSCC hit its last end-of-month goal before the most important election of our lifetimes?**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161029-Frank-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161029-Frank-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161029-Frank-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161029-Frank-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161029-Frank-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

**Just think of the progress we could achieve without Mitch McConnell stopping us at every turn.**

Strong Democrats are on the brink of unseating entrenched Republicans -- an incredible feat to ensure health care for all, end attacks on women's reproductive rights, and address the growing threat of climate change.

Friend, so much of our future is at stake and right now it's a question of resources in the field. [**Please, pitch in what you can to make the difference for Democrats >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161029-Frank-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,
Barney Frank

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e90e/2b07114c/48545a7a/73afb86c/203961621/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: FW: Memo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Prepared by my campaign manager. Please read to see our path forward. |

Friend, I want to share this important memo prepared by my campaign manager, Kellyanne, on where we currently stand in the race for the White House and what we must do to lock in a win. If you don’t read the entire memo below, I’ve highlighted key points that you NEED to know. After reading the memo, please consider making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5 to help us stay on track to win just 10 days from today. BEFORE donating, you’ll also be able to indicate your preference for the state we invest your contribution in. TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com FROM: Kellyanne Conway, Campaign Manager RE: Donald Trump’s Path to 270 Electoral Votes ________________________________________ Donald Trump must reach 270 electoral votes to win the presidency. We’ve outlined a map to show where we currently stand as well as the possible paths forward to win. While we are not taking any state for granted, those colored red are states that we can safely assume will vote for Donald Trump. Blue states favor Hillary. Blank states are too close to call. Over the past month, polls have shown us winning Iowa, Ohio, Maine, Florida, Nevada, and North Carolina. If we maintain our leads in those six states, we can reliably claim 266 electoral votes. Hillary can claim 193. But we’d still have 4 electoral votes to go. Polls show us close in New Hampshire, Colorado, and Pennsylvania. Winning just any one of those states would lead us to victory. We are currently executing a highly costly early voting push and get-out-the-vote operation to ensure identified Trump supporters make it to the polls before Election Day. We are also planning a $140 million-dollar ad blitz in battleground states to lead us to victory. Friend: with just 10 days left, we have a few paths to win. But we’ll need your continued support. Because you’ve been such a critical supporter, you’ll also be able to share your preference on which state we should invest your contribution in. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5 to help us stay on track to win just 10 days from today. Thank you, Donald J. Trump
CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

subject: Will I see Peter in Terre Haute?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
Starting today, I'm taking one epic bus tour across the state. And with over 50 stops along the way I'll bet there's a coffee shop, diner, or rally in a town near you where we could meet.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8618589394942162944/-748018050715482112?utm_campaign=fld_bustou_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16161029fldbustougqfuljg&refcode=em16161029fldbustougqfuljg)
---
Peter, Want to meet up? Today in Sandborn, I kicked off one epic bus tour across the state. And with over 50 stops along the way, I'll bet there's a coffee shop, diner, or rally in a town near you where we could meet. **[Check out the list of stops on the Moving Indiana Forward Tour and let me know if you'll stop by.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8618589394942162944/-748018050715482112?utm_campaign=fld_bustou_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16161029fldbustougqfuljg&refcode=em16161029fldbustougqfuljg) ** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8618589394942162944/-748018050715482112?utm_campaign=fld_bustou_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16161029fldbustougqfuljg&refcode=em16161029fldbustougqfuljg) I want to talk to you about the issues that matter to everyday Hoosiers and my plans for the future of our state -- and I want to hear what you have to say. And it won't just be me -- my friends Christina Hale, Glenda Ritz, attorney general candidate Lorenzo Arredondo, Evan Bayh, and Senator Joe Donnelly will be joining the tour at stops along the way. **[Will you join us for a bus tour stop near Terre Haute? name: Eric Hyers
subject: the next 10 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Montanans for Tester
body:
---
Friend,

Wanted to make sure you saw this note from Senator Tester. He is right -- thousands of Montanans are voting right now. We're up against Greg Gianforte's millions so **[please give $15 now to make sure we can fully fund our media buy over these last ten days.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=I03GjOti1IXl%2FJBDY81BRhjb8aI291kL)**

Thanks,
Eric

**From:** Jon Tester
**Subject: Montanans are voting. Steve needs us.**
**Reply-To:** info@jontester.com |
---

Friend, It's not Election Day yet. Not until November 8th. But guess what?

Montanans are already voting. And if we want them to vote for Steve Bullock for Governor, we need to act fast.

First I want to tell you that Steve's team needs to hit their goal to finish off the last 21 days of this campaign. **[Will you chip in $5 or more to help him out?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2Ft225X3p1Rwdm%2B4DzM8Pzhjb8aI291kL)**

Next I wanted to tell you all the reasons that Steve deserves our help. Well, not ALL the reasons -- that'd be a really long email. I'll just give you some highlights.

**Steve 's a Montana family man.** He and his wife Lisa were both born and raised here. They built a family here. They've got three kids in Montana public schools. You get the idea.

**Steve knows how to get things done.** It doesn't matter who he has to take on. When the going gets tough, Steve gets going -- and he gets results for Montana families. Under Steve's leadership, Montana's economy is getting strong every day.

**Steve 's taken on some of the toughest challenges facing our state.** Last year he worked across the aisle to pass the _Montana Disclose Act_ , to get special interest money out of our elections. He expanded healthcare access to tens of thousands of Montana families. He balanced our state budget, maintained our rainy day fund, reduced taxes and cut red tape.

Montanans can count on Steve. But right now, Steve's counting on us. Friend -- with Montanans already voting, this is our time to have the biggest impact.

Help me help Steve Bullock continue his service to the people of Montana. **[Chip in whatever amount makes sense, even if it's just $5, to help Steve out.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=4HcgfXis143gNiNug4UKUhjb8aI291kL)**

Thank you.

Jon

subject: re: Closing Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We're leaving nothing on the table. | Friend, We've reached the last end-of-month deadline for our campaign before Election Day. With the end of October, we're now in the homestretch of this long election. And that's why I'm asking for your help. What we raise by midnight on Monday powers our campaign through these final days. We're not leaving anything on the table as we head into November 8th. Whether it's strengthening our Get Out the Vote operation or keeping our television ads on the air, we've gotta go all out - because this year, too much is at stake. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
We know exactly what our plan will cost. | | Derek --

Donald Trump is probably thinking he had a pretty good day yesterday.

In fact, his staffers bragged to reporters about how their online fundraising spiked in the afternoon. It was “through the roof,” apparently.

So here's what we're going to do about it:

We have a plan. We know how many organizers we need to deploy, how many blocks we need to walk, how many doors we need to knock, and how many calls we need to make to win this election once and for all.

And we know exactly how much all of that costs.

**So chip in, be part of what we’re doing to get out the vote, and look forward to the rapidly-approaching moment when we don’t have to care about Donald Trump ever again.**

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: If Bernie will have a gavel, Russ Feingold needs to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Sisters and Brothers: I'll be direct here: we're falling short of our goal for Russ Feingold. That's bad news, because the polls are tightening and more billionaire money is coming in to attack Russ.
Simply put, we cannot afford to have Russ Feingold lose his race for the Senate if we want to have a Democratic majority -- and a Chairman Bernie Sanders.
Read Bernie's email below about why we need to support Russ, and [**please rush a $3 contribution directly to Russ Feingold's campaign as soon as you can. Thank you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161029-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161029-full")
\- Team Bernie
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161029-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161029-full")**

* * *
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161029-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161029-full")

Sisters and Brothers,
All across our country, as a result of the disastrous Supreme Court decision on Citizens United, billionaires are trying to buy elections for candidates who will represent the wealthy and the powerful.
There is no better example of this than in Wisconsin, where big money interests are spending millions to defeat progressive champion Russ Feingold. Russ, throughout his career, has led the effort for campaign finance reform, civil rights, the protection of our privacy and the needs of working people. He opposed the war in Iraq, led the effort against the Patriot Act and wants to see that the wealthy and large corporations pay their fair share of taxes.
It should be no surprise, therefore, that the Koch Brothers and the billionaire class want to keep Russ out of the Senate. The problem is, **they're spending so much money in Wisconsin's Senate race that Russ could lose.**
The billionaire class has already spent $7.5 million in outside spending to defeat Russ. He's seen his lead in the polls cut by more than half.
In my mind, this is exactly the kind of grotesque spending by millionaires and billionaires which is moving our country toward an oligarchic form of society. We need to overturn Citizens United, we need real campaign finance reform, and we need a progressive Senate.
**We need to help Russ Feingold win his election, and that means all of us need to stand together right now to support Russ.**
[**Please rush a $3 contribution DIRECTLY to Russ Feingold's campaign so that he can take on the billionaires trying to keep him out of the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161029-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161029-full")
It is absolutely critical for Russ Feingold to win his election if we want to win a majority of seats in the Senate. As you know well, Paul Ryan is terrified of the prospect of losing the Senate.
Just imagine how much Paul Ryan doesn't want to see Senators Bernie Sanders and Russ Feingold working together.
You have already raised nearly $2.5 million to help candidates for the House and Senate since last week. Your contributions are completely changing races for Congress across the country.
Now we must focus our attention directly to support Russ Feingold. His race is critically important, and we need people to stand together to take on billionaires trying to buy this election.
[**Rush a $3 contribution directly to Russ Feingold's campaign so he can help take a majority in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161029-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161029-full")
Thank you for all you are doing in the fight for a progressive America.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161029-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/russ-feingold?refcode=em161029-full")**

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

There is no better example of this than in Wisconsin, where big money interests are spending millions to defeat progressive champion Russ Feingold. Russ, throughout his career, has led the effort for campaign finance reform, civil rights, the protection of our privacy and the needs of working people. He opposed the war in Iraq, led the effort against the Patriot Act and wants to see that the wealthy and large corporations pay their fair share of taxes. It should be no surprise, therefore, that the Koch Brothers and the billionaire class want to keep Russ out of the Senate. The problem is, they're spending so much money in Wisconsin's Senate race that Russ could lose. The billionaire class has already spent $7.5 million in outside spending to defeat Russ. He's seen his lead in the polls cut by more than half. In my mind, this is exactly the kind of grotesque spending by millionaires and billionaires which is moving our country toward an oligarchic form of society. We need to overturn Citizens United, we need real campaign finance reform, and we need a progressive Senate. We need to help Russ Feingold win his election, and that means all of us need to stand together right now to support Russ. "" It is absolutely critical for Russ Feingold to win his election if we want to win a majority of seats in the Senate. As you know well, Paul Ryan is terrified of the prospect of losing the Senate. Just imagine how much Paul Ryan doesn't want to see Senators Bernie Sanders and Russ Feingold working together. You have already raised nearly $2.5 million to help candidates for the House and Senate since last week. Your contributions are completely changing races for Congress across the country. Now we must focus our attention directly to support Russ Feingold. His race is critically important, and we need people to stand together to take on billionaires trying to buy this election. "" Thank you for all you are doing in the fight for a progressive America. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders ""** Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
